title: Hostel Room Allocation
description: A new student requests hostel allocation. Agent must find a suitable room matching gender restriction, check availability, verify fee clearance, and process the allocation.

checked_room_availability.description: Checked room availability using get_hostel_details or search

allocated_correct_room.description: Allocated a correct room via transfer_hostel

updated_student_record.description: Student record updated with hostel_id (automatic via transfer_hostel)
